hero.titleLine3: Hot and fast - at your door.
hero.subtitle: Order your favorite food with fast delivery across Kotayk and Yerevan. Fresh rolls, hot pizza, and juicy shawarma.
hero.seoLine: Hot sushi, pizza and shawarma with fast delivery in Yerevan and Nor Hachn. Free delivery in Nor Hachn.

home.promo_hot_title: From the oven to your door
home.seo_text_title: Sushi & Pizza Delivery in Nor Hachn and Yerevan
home.seo_text_body: East West Delivery is your fast food delivery service. Order fresh sushi, rolls, hot pizza, shawarma and lahmajo with delivery in 45-60 minutes. We cook from quality ingredients and deliver your order hot. Place an order online in just a few clicks!
